info.name: Notifications
info.description: In-app notifications inbox — list, mark individual or all-as-read. Backs the bell drawer in the top bar.

query.description: true = only unread; useful for the bell badge count

request.description:
List the authenticated user's notifications, newest-first.

**Requires:** Bearer token

**Query params:**
- `page` — default 1
- `size` — default 20, max 100
- `unread_only` — when `true`, only returns unread items. The shell bell uses `size=1&unread_only=true` to drive the badge count.

**Returns:** `NotificationListResponse` (200) — `items[]`, `total`, `unread_count`, `page`, `size`, `pages`. Each item: `id`, `type` (`draft_ready` | `question_set_published` | `question_set_voted` | `new_material_in_subject`), `title`, `body`, `payload` (free-form click-through metadata), `read_at` (nullable), `created_at`.

Mark a single notification as read. Idempotent — calling twice is a no-op the second time.

**Requires:** Bearer token (must own the notification)

**Path params:**
- `notification_id` — UUID

**Returns:** `NotificationResponse` (200) with `read_at` populated.

Bulk-mark every unread notification for the authenticated user as read.

**Requires:** Bearer token

**Returns:** `{ "marked_read": <count> }` (200)
